angle: Recursion punch / raise-specific (eight years funding others, now our own)
hook_type: Cadence numbers + 'for other founders' recursion gap (first-timer voice)
tactic: Proof cadence with recursion bound -> name the CSF offer -> waitlist
primary_text:
324 raises and $234M+ funded for other founders since 2018. The next one is ours.

For eight years our platform helped Australians own a piece of companies like Naked Life and Medigrowth. 137,000 of them did. We stayed private the whole time. Now we are opening our own Crowd-Sourced Funding raise.

The waitlist is free. You read the offer document before you decide.

Leave your email. We will tell you the moment the offer goes live.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: Eight years funding others. Now our own.
description: 324 raises for other founders. The next one is ours.
_source_label: DRC V5 -- W8 Recursion punch / Raise-specific (first-timers)
_iterates: BIRCHAL-V4-A1 recursion DNA; sharpened 'for other founders / now our own' contrast (the client's 'make it a raise' note in a first-timer voice).
_v5_rationale: Hook rewrite from the first scratch draft (which opened '8 years.' and scored Halbert 3): now '324 raises and $234M+ funded for other founders since 2018. The next one is ours.' Halbert 5/5 in --primary-text mode (cadence + recursion gap). 'for other founders ... The next one is ours' is the explicit recursion that answers the client's 'doesn't read like a raise' note.
'We stayed private the whole time' is the confessional-shape beat the V1 open-question flagged as a reserved V4+ angle: first-person + specific timeframe + curiosity, now landed here.
Names it 'our own Crowd-Sourced Funding raise' once so it is unmistakably a live CSF offer, not brand content.

V5b: stronger email-capture CTA (FarmThru-proven pattern). Closing CTA changed from the weaker 'save your spot' framing to an explicit email-capture micro-action ('Leave your email...'), per clients/farm-thru/learnings-meta-ad.md verbatim ('Outcome-stated CTA: leave your email, we will tell you the moment it goes live'). Notification-framed, no transaction verb, AU English, no contractions, CSF-compliant. Risk-reversal sentence, hook, headline, proof cadence, fact citations, and the verbatim CSF warning all unchanged. Button cta field 'Save my spot' (approved WAITLIST-CTA verbatim) unchanged.
_drc_audience: B2C considered, solution-aware. First-time CSF investors.
_a_pile_signals: recursion gap (the next one is ours)
_compliance_findings_resolved: PREOFFER-VERBS: 'save your spot', 'we will tell you the moment', 'read'. No transaction verbs. 'funded' is past-tense factual about prior raises.
VERBATIM-OFFER-LANGUAGE: 'we will tell you the moment the offer goes live'. No 'we will send'.
VERBATIM-CSF-WARNING: byte-exact final line, appears exactly once.
BRAND-EXCLUDED: only verified-good raises (Naked Life RAISE-001, Medigrowth RAISE-003).
Subject discipline: 'Birchal' appears zero times in body; 'our platform' / first-person we/our; recursion referents explicit (other founders vs us).
Number traceability: 324=PLAT-001, $234M+=PLAT-002, 2018/eight years=PLAT-004, 137,000=PLAT-003, brands=RAISE-001/003. No market-share / #1 / first claim.
